name: Trucker Horror
short_description: The main character is a truck driver. Along the way, he finds a road that is not on the map and drives along it. On the road, abandoned cars and abandoned gas stations are a place shrouded in horror, secrets and mysteries. Soon the hero realizes that someone is watching him...
detailed_description:
The main character is a truck driver. Along the way, he finds a road that is not on the map and drives along it. On the road, abandoned cars and abandoned gas stations are a place shrouded in horror, secrets and mysteries. Soon the hero realizes that someone is watching him...

Delve into the plot, exploring gloomy locations, pick up objects and move on a truck from one point to another. To get out of the forest road. Task To get out of the forest road of horrors...

Main features of the game:

  • Atmospheric and scary sounds

  • High quality locations made on Unreal Engine 5

  • Well-developed dialogues and history game

  • Truck control

  • Picking up and examining things

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Russian, Ukrainian
